AddDeviceForm.addressDesc: The network address can be an IP and port like '192.168.0.100:8080' or a URL like 'example.com':
AddDeviceForm.errorCouldNotConnect: Could not connect to this device
AddDeviceForm.errorInvalidAddress: Please enter a valid IP address, URL, or hostname
AddDeviceForm.nameDesc: Choose a name for this device so you can remember it later:
BirthYearSelect.birthYearTooltip: Provide an estimate if you are unsure.
ChooseAdmin.description: Choose someone to manage channels and user accounts.
CommonSyncStrings.changeLater: You can change this in your learning facility settings later.
CommonSyncStrings.devicesUnreachable: Some devices are not responding. Please check the connection and try again.
CommonSyncStrings.distinctFacilityNameEx: This facility is different from '{facilities}'. These facilities will not be synced with each other.
CommonSyncStrings.onMyOwn: For homeschooling and other personal use.
CommonSyncStrings.superAdminPermissionsD: This super admin account allows you to manage all facilities, resources, and users on this device.
CommonSyncStrings.warningFirstImportedIs: Please note: The first user you choose to import will be given super admin permissions on this device, and be able to manage all channels and device settings.
ConfirmAccountDetails.confirmAccountUser: Your account will be merged into this account in '{target_facility}'. You will need to use the username and password for this account from now on.
ConfirmAccountUsername.confirmAccountLin: You are about to join '{target_facility}' learning facility as '{username}'.
You can continue with this username or create a new account for '{target_facility}'.
ConfirmChangeFacility.changeFacilityInfo: You are about to move your account and progress data to '{target_facility}' learning facility. Your current data will still be available to you and will also be accessible to any administrators of this learning facility.

Your user account type will change from '{role}' to 'learner' and you will no longer be able to manage resources on this device. You will need someone with admin permissions in '{facility}' to change your account type back to '{role}'.
You can also search for an account in '{target_facility}' to merge with. Progress data from both accounts will be combined into one account.
ConfirmMerge.confirmMergeInfoLine: You are about to merge two accounts and their progress data. Progress data includes your interactions with resources, time spent, and points. You cannot undo this.
ConfirmMerge.consequences: I understand the consequences of merging accounts
CreateAccount.description: New account for '{fullName}' in '{targetFacility}' learning facility
CreatePassword.description: ‘{targetFacility}’ requires accounts to have passwords. Enter a password that you would like to use for ‘{username}’ in ‘{targetFacility}’
CreatePassword.hint: You can enter your current password if you already have one.
MergeAccountDialog.mergeAccountUserInfo: Enter the password of the account '{username}' in '{target_facility}' learning facility that you want to merge your account with.
MergeAccountDialog.mergeAccountUsingAdmi: Enter the username and password of a facility admin or a super admin for '{target_facility}' learning facility.
MergeDifferentAccounts.mergeAccountUserI: Enter the username of the account you want to merge your account into.
MergeDifferentAccounts.userDoesNotExist: That username does not exist in the target facility
MergeFacility.failedTaskError: Merging task for '{username}' has failed due to some problem connecting to the '{target_facility}'. Please, check your network connection and try again.
MergeFacility.userAdminError: User '{username}' already exists in '{target_facility}' and is not a learner. Please choose a different username.
MergeFacility.userExistsError: User '{username}' already exists in '{target_facility}'. Please choose a different username.
PaginatedListContainer.pagination: { visibleStartRange, number } - { visibleEndRange, number } of { numFilteredItems, number }
PicturePasswordStrings.allIconsSelected: 3 icons already selected. To change an icon, uncheck it and select another.
PicturePasswordStrings.childFriendlyIcon: The child-friendly icons are designed for young learners. These icons use the same objects as the standard set, in a more colorful and engaging style.
PicturePasswordStrings.formAriaLabel: Select 3 pictures below to sign in to Kalanfa
PicturePasswordStrings.iconSelectedAsFir: {icon} selected as first, select the second
PicturePasswordStrings.iconSelectedAsSec: {icon} selected as second, select the third
PicturePasswordStrings.iconSelectedAsThi: {icon} selected as third, confirm all 3 below
PicturePasswordStrings.learnerCreationDi: Learner creation is currently disabled due to reaching limit of 1300 learners.
PicturePasswordStrings.learnerLimitReach: This facility is using picture passwords, which are available only for facilities with fewer than 1300 learners.
You've reached this limit. To add more learners, change the learner sign-in method in Facility settings.
PicturePasswordStrings.learnersPictureSi: Learners will sign in by selecting a unique 3-picture code.
PicturePasswordStrings.noLearnersInClass: There are no learners in this class
PicturePasswordStrings.noPasswordSignInD: Learners can sign in with their username
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordAs: If you forget, your coach can help.
Remember these pictures and write them down if you need to. You will need them to sign in to Kalanfa in the future.
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordDe: Learners sign in by selecting a 3-picture sequence, with the option to use a username instead.
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordFo: Password for {learnerName} is a list of {count} pictures: {labels}
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordIn: Learners sign in by selecting a 3-picture sequence unique to their account. Each sequence is auto-generated and assigned by Kalanfa and cannot be changed. This feature is only available in facilities with fewer than 1,300 learners.
Picture password is designed for early-literacy learners.
Learners who join the facility after the 1,300 user limit can sign in with a username.
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordUn: Picture passwords are only available for facilities with up to {learnerLimit} learners.
Picture password is not available right now.
PicturePasswordStrings.picturePasswordWi: Kalanfa will automatically assign a picture password after the user is created.
ProfilePage.changeLearningFacilityDescri: Move your account and progress data to another learning facility.
ProfilePage.learnModalLine1: Learning facility represents the location where you are using Kalanfa, such as a school, training center, or a home.
ProfilePage.learnModalLine2: Moving your account to another learning facility means administrators of that facility will be able to access your data.
SelectFacility.noPermissionToJoinFacilit: You don't have permission to join this learning facility
TaskStrings.importSuccessStatus: The '{facilityName}' learning facility has been successfully loaded to this device
TaskStrings.taskLODFinishedByLabel: Account '{fullname}' from '{facilityname}' successfully loaded to this device
UsernameExists.changeFacilityInfoLine1: An account with the username '{username}' already exists in the '{target_facility}' learning facility. You can merge your account and its progress data with this account.
UsernameExists.changeFacilityInfoLine2: Alternatively, you can create a new account and all your progress data will be moved to this new account.
